---
title: "Data Synthesis"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

::: {style="text-align:center"}

Data for this research are collected from a wide range of sources: from published studies, La Selva researchers themselves, databases, and fieldwork.

:::

::: {.image-row}

<a href="https://tropicalstudies.org/binabitrop/">
  <img src="images/ots_logo.jpg" width="200">
</a>

<a href="https://www.inaturalist.org/">
  <img src="images/inat_logo.png" width="200">
</a>

<a href="https://www.gbif.org/">
  <img src="images/gbif_logo.png" width="200">
</a>

:::
